'''Banno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Banno held the rank as [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and was stationed on [[Azure/Legends|Azure]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Solomahal/Legends|Solomahal]]. When they were ambushed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], Banno fought alongside [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in the [[Battle of Azure|battle]].

{{Char-stub}}
